description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure dressed in a fitted short-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants, with a distinctive full-face mask that covers the entire head and features a gold and black design. The mask has a sculpted, almost metallic look, with pronounced cheek and jaw lines, and covers the head completely, leaving no hair visible. The figure's arms are slightly bent at the elbows, and the hands are clenched into fists, suggesting a strong, assertive posture. The shirt fits snugly, accentuating the broad shoulders and upper body, while the pants are more relaxed but still tailored. The footwear appears to be slip-on shoes with a simple, rounded design. The overall appearance is that of a streetwise or urban character, possibly inspired by wrestling or vigilante aesthetics.
description: A muscular adult male wearing a fitted shirt, straight pants, slip-on shoes, and a full-face gold and black mask, standing with clenched fists.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad chest, fitted shirt, clenched fists, and the full-face mask with gold and black details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, the muscular arm, and the straight cut of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and shirt, the wide shoulders, and the relaxed fit of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mask's profile, arm definition, and the side of the shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants with a full-face mask
